title: Force-Velocity Contrast
description: Alternate high-torque and high-spin at same power

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Slow down. Yes, slower. Your aerobic system is thanking you right now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: This should feel easy. If you're breathing hard, you're going too hard.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Not every workout needs to hurt. This is smart training.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This feels like cheating. It's not. It's science.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Base miles. The work no one sees but everyone needs.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/4. This hurts because it's supposed to. Keep going.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Every interval makes you stronger. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1. Your legs have opinions. Noted.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-100 rpm, 90% FTP. Focus on form and execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very  character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Power: 90%, Cadence: 85-100 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 3/4. This hurts because it's supposed to. Keep going.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've got this. Stay focused and execute the plan.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 3. Your legs have opinions. Noted.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 4. Your legs have opinions. Noted.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've got this. Stay focused and execute the plan.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very  character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay smooth. Breathe deep. You've got this.
